name: JD Vance
summary: JD Vance consistently displays a pattern of behavior that is dismissive, divisive, and often factually inaccurate. He frequently targets childless individuals, labeling them as sociopathic and attempting to stigmatize them. Vance has also demonstrated a willingness to spread misinformation and conspiracy theories, including claims about Haitian migrants eating pets and the 2020 presidential election being rigged by Big Tech. He has shown a disregard for the truth and a willingness to manipulate public opinion for his own purposes. Additionally, Vance has consistently taken a hardline stance on issues such as abortion, gun control, and same-sex marriage, and has proposed extreme policies such as the federal criminalization of gender-affirming care for minors.

entries.fact: JD Vance said in a podcast interview that being childless 'makes people more sociopathic and ultimately our whole country a little bit less, less mentally stable'

JD Vance said in a speech at a Center for Christian Virtue leadership meeting that childless teachers were 'trying to brainwash the minds of our children' and criticized American Federation of Teachers President Randi Weingarten
JD Vance advised Trump to fire all civil servants and replace them with Trump supporters
JD Vance suggested in an interview on The Charlie Kirk Show that childless people should be taxed at a higher rate than those with children

JD Vance said in a Fox News interview that the country is run by 'a bunch of childless cat ladies who are miserable at their own lives and the choices that they've made and so they want to make the rest of the country miserable too'
JD Vance voted against raising the debt ceiling, standing against final passage of the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023
JD Vance said the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023 would result in 'a reduced military in the face of a rising threat from China'
JD Vance and Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene introduced legislation that would have made gender-affirming care for minors a federal crime, with penalties of up to 12 years in prison
JD Vance sponsored the Dismantle DEI Act, which would ban federal diversity, equity, and inclusion programs and funding for agencies, contractors, and organizations receiving federal funds
JD Vance said Vice President Kamala Harris 'can go to hell' in response to her criticism of Donald Trump's visit to Arlington National Cemetery

JD Vance alleged that Haitian illegal immigrants were 'draining social services and generally causing chaos all over Springfield, Ohio' and that 'reports now show that people have had their pets abducted and eaten by people who shouldn't be in this country'
JD Vance defended his claims about Haitian migrants eating cats, saying that he was willing to create stories to get the American media's attention

JD Vance said that it was 'possible, of course, that all of these rumors will turn out to be false' regarding Haitian immigrants eating pets, but also told his supporters to 'keep the cat memes flowing'
JD Vance said that 'a child was murdered by a Haitian migrant who had no right to be here', despite the child's death being an accidental collision between vehicles
JD Vance said he did not believe Trump lost the 2020 presidential election and that he believed 'Big Tech rigged the election' through censorship
JD Vance objected to being fact-checked during the vice presidential debate, arguing that the rules were that he would not be fact-checked
JD Vance cast the tie-breaking vote to confirm Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense
JD Vance wrote that judges aren't allowed to control the executive's legitimate power, after multiple federal judges issued temporary rulings against various Trump administration actions
JD Vance told Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy that it's disrespectful for him to come to the Oval Office and try to litigate the conflict in front of the American media
JD Vance claimed that Zelenskyy 'went to Pennsylvania and campaigned for the opposition in October' 2024, which was incorrect
JD Vance accused Zelenskyy of showing a 'propaganda tour' of Ukraine and asked whether Zelenskyy had ever offered thanks to President Trump
JD Vance replied to Zelenskyy's question about diplomacy by saying that he was discussing 'diplomacy that's going to end the destruction of Ukraine'
JD Vance lamented that the globalist economy had caused the United States to borrow money from Chinese peasants to buy the things those Chinese peasants manufacture
JD Vance said that if he had been vice president during the 2020 presidential election, he would not have certified the results
JD Vance opposes abortion
JD Vance opposes gun control
JD Vance opposes same-sex marriage
JD Vance publicly announced support for Trump, apologizing for his past criticisms of Trump and deleting some of them
JD Vance asserted that parents should have more voting power than non-parents
JD Vance expressed a belief that childlessness is linked to sociopathy
JD Vance proposed federal criminalization of gender-affirming care for minors
Vance will primarily focus on blue states as 'fraud czar', a role announced by President Trump
Vice President JD Vance praised Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán during a visit to Budapest, just days before elections in Hungary, and blasted the European Union.
Vance warned the Pope to be careful when talking about theology
Iran's military is threatening to retaliate after the U.S. seized one of its cargo ships traveling through the Gulf of Oman over the weekend.
